scraped_headline: Pavo AI || ex-Head of AI @ Sourcegraph, ex-Spotify || Enterprise Superintelligence
scraped_about:
I'm a machine learning scientist working on ML techniques for recommendations in online marketplaces. I work on multi-objective decisioning, recommendations, marketplaces, personalization and experimentation. I have led various ML projects from basic research to production, with >10 product launches for 350+ million users.

I have over 12 years of experience working on machine learning problems applied to various real world applications. I have published over 50 research papers, and filed >10 patents. I have a PhD in Machine Learning from UCL on developing efficient machine learning models for user tasks & need understanding, knowledge discovery and decision optimization.

I have taught a number of courses, summer school sessions & tutorials on the topics of multi-objective decisioning, personalization and user intent understanding. Details here: http://rishabhmehrotra.com/teaching.html

Personal website: http://rishabhmehrotra.com/
Research publications: https://dblp1.uni-trier.de/pers/hd/m/Mehrotra:Rishabh
Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.co.uk/citations?user=X9BKWWoAAAAJ&hl=en

scraped_headline: GSI & GCC Field Engineering Leader | Cloud & AI Adoption | CoE Builder | Speaker & Community Builder
scraped_about:
Data Engineer at heart who loves solving real business problems with technology. Over the past 16+ years, as a Pre-Sales and Partner Engineering leader working at the intersection of technology, GTM strategy, and customer advocacy, I help enterprises modernise, simplify, and build cloud-ready and AI-ready data infrastructure with confidence.

I’ve spent more than a decade in the India market, working closely with customers, GCCs, and partners across Banking, Financial Services, and Life Sciences. Whether it’s evaluating the right products, designing modern data architectures, or guiding multi-million-dollar transformation programs, my goal is simple — make technology practical, scalable, and easy to adopt.

I currently lead a global team of architects, driving technical strategy, enablement, evangelism, hackathons, and asset development across AWS, Snowflake, and modern AI/BI ecosystems. A big part of my role is driving adoption—working closely with GSIs to build industry-ready accelerators and modernization offerings. This includes contributions to initiatives like AI4BI, GenAI automation frameworks, Mainframe modernization, , ETL Migration/Modernization and  SAP modernization on AWS and Snowflake, all focused on accelerating adoption across top-tier strategic accounts.

Community building has always been an important part of who I am. I speak at events, write, and host conversations through podcasts. I also run Data Heroes, a community and meetup space where practitioners openly discuss cloud adoption, architectures, and real-world challenges. Over the years, I’ve also helped build Centers of Excellence( COE) across the globe for our top GSI partners for both Qlik and Talend, strengthening capability, delivery maturity, and field execution. Through these programs and my partner-enablement work, I’ve had the privilege of enabling thousands of practitioners across the ecosystem.
